scientific_question: Under a preregistered conditional wartime stress envelope, does physically constrained event-timed control improve canonical ReT over the strongest same-cell static and open-loop comparators without buying resources or shedding service?

relationship_to_prior_work.garrido_risk_headroom_sensitivity_v1: closed bounded null for exact Cf1-Cf20 plus impact <=2 and regime-tailored Track-A constants
relationship_to_prior_work.restricted_pi_timing_ceiling_v1: closed unopened because its obsolete cross-regime posture-reversal prerequisite failed
relationship_to_prior_work.new_increment: tests within-cell event timing directly; no cross-regime constant reversal is required
relationship_to_prior_work.not_a_rescue: new risk masks, amplitudes, temporal coupling estimand, comparator and fresh seed blocks are frozen prospectively and all cells must be reported

claim_scope.allowed: conditional military supply-chain stress test under the frozen synthetic wartime envelope
forbidden: claim that the selected cell represents the MFSC without external calibration
choose risk amplitudes after learner performance
rename restricted timing ceiling as total H_PI
authorize a learner before classical observable validation

masks.mechanism: attacks on lines of communication during contingency-demand surges
environmental and forward-unit capacity loss during contingency demand
assembly breakdowns and quality defects during contingency demand

coupling_modes.definition: each cluster-driving R24 event has one coupled non-R24 disruption starting 72 hours earlier
coupled disruption and R24 surge share the same onset timestamp
each cluster-driving R24 event has one coupled non-R24 disruption starting 72 hours later

coupled_schedule_semantics.driver: R24 event onsets generated from the frozen R24 CRN stream
coupled_schedule_semantics.non_R24_events: every coupled R24 onset schedules every non-R24 risk in the active mask at the frozen offset; impact draws remain risk-specific and policy-independent
coupled_schedule_semantics.native_stream_rule: in coupled modes, native non-R24 occurrence streams are replaced by the coupled schedule rather than added to it; R24 retains its native phi-scaled stream
coupled_schedule_semantics.frequency_interpretation: phi controls R24 cluster frequency in coupled modes and each active risk's native stream in independent mode

primary_grid.construction: Cartesian product of 3 masks x 4 frequency levels x 3 impact levels x 4 coupling modes

frequency_semantics.uniform_window_risks: divide the native inter-arrival upper bound by phi
frequency_semantics.R14: multiply the native per-cycle defect probability by phi, capped only by the existing numerical 0.98 bound
frequency_semantics.inactive_risks: disabled and consume no event or impact RNG
frequency_semantics.policy_independence: event tapes are generated before policy evaluation and replayed identically across every comparator

impact_semantics.R11_R21_R22_R23: multiply recovery duration mean by psi
impact_semantics.R24: multiply surge quantity bounds by psi
impact_semantics.R14: psi does not apply; R14 severity is controlled only through its defect-event probability phi

required_ledgers: operation downtime fraction by risk and node
saturation_audit.promotion_rule: a cell with positive clipped surge quantity or an unaccounted probability/availability cap is reported as model-saturated and cannot enter the selected component

primary_grid.no_posthoc_extension: No phi, psi, mask, offset, correlation mode or risk may be added after any scientific tape is opened. A more severe future envelope is a new contract and cannot rescue this atlas.

single_R3.label: R3_SINGLE_CATASTROPHIC_EVENT
single_R3.interpretation: scheduled black-swan stress fixture; not a probability estimate

persistent_campaign.label: PERSISTENT_PRODUCTION_DISTRIBUTION_DISRUPTION_NOT_R3
persistent_campaign.interpretation: researcher extension representing repeated campaign disruption; must never be called repeated black swans

catastrophic_scenarios.selection_use: report-only boundary diagnostics; cannot select or rescue the primary connected region

nulls.required_result: restricted timing headroom exactly zero subject to deterministic tie handling

nulls.definition: event timestamps are emitted on the observation/event ledger but no physical transition changes
nulls.required_result: all action-independent physical trajectories and timing headroom exactly zero

physical_control.HOLD: preserve the requested posture, create no top-up, and consume no exogenous RNG
physical_control.dispatch: daily immediate when included by the frozen posture
physical_control.shifts: ramp by at most one level per day under the existing finite surge-hour budget
physical_control.buffers: 168-hour immutable commitment, no cancellation or overwrite, at most one new commitment per 168 hours
physical_control.churn_cost: none; intervention count and action magnitude are reported

restricted_privileged_timing_family.event_information: realized future onset and end timestamps for active risks in the current tape
restricted_privileged_timing_family.postures: the complete frozen 18-posture Track-A constant frontier
restricted_privileged_timing_family.same_cell_estimand: best safe restricted event-timed template minus the strongest same-cell comparator
restricted_privileged_timing_family.cluster_rule: events separated by no more than 168 hours form one cluster; overlapping intervention windows are unioned
restricted_privileged_timing_family.same_time_rule: exogenous physical risk transitions occur before the daily observation and decision
restricted_privileged_timing_family.finite_family_requirement: the implementation freeze must enumerate every posture pair and offset template and publish the exact count before seed access

comparators.constants: all 18 Track-A constants evaluated in every cell
comparators.weekly_open_loop: complete frozen periodic posture-calendar family with an exact enumeration certificate
comparators.weekly_clairvoyant: the same restricted templates rounded to weekly decision boundaries
comparators.resource_matched_open_loop: best open-loop schedule with no less scheduled resource entitlement than the dynamic candidate and no greater realized use
comparators.future_observable_if_privileged_passes: one frozen EWMA plus hysteresis trigger using only realized history

development_screen.use: development screen and connected-region selection only
development_screen.simultaneous_inference_family: all 144 primary cells and all mandatory primary/guardrail estimands
development_screen.bootstrap: paired studentized one-sided max-t with comparator re-selection in every resample

cell_pass: zero clipped surge quantity and no unaccounted risk saturation
at least two distinct intervention times and two distinct action sequences
promotion_and_region_rule.adjacency: same mask and coupling mode; cells are adjacent when phi or psi moves by one frozen ordinal level and the other coordinate is unchanged
promotion_and_region_rule.component_pass: at least four adjacent passing cells spanning at least two phi levels and two psi levels
promotion_and_region_rule.selection: among passing components choose the one with the smallest minimum severity score log2(phi)+log2(psi); then smallest maximum severity; then mask order LOC_SURGE, THEATER_CAPACITY_SURGE, PRODUCTION_QUALITY_SURGE; then coupling order independent, disruption_leads_surge_72h, coincident, surge_leads_disruption_72h
promotion_and_region_rule.single_cell_positive: a single positive cell is reported but cannot promote
promotion_and_region_rule.no_component: stop the wartime timing family without adding risks or amplitudes

validation.opened_only_after: development component passes and an immutable selected-component execution freeze is committed
validation.primary_gate: simultaneous LCB95 of safe canonical ReT increment >= 0.01 in every frozen component cell, at least 34/48 favorable tapes, all resources and guardrails non-inferior
validation.if_fail: close without cell deletion, new risk levels, new timing offsets, policy replacement or metric change
validation.if_pass: establish validated restricted perfect-information timing ceiling only; freeze one classical observable controller next

learner_and_papers.sequence: privileged timing ceiling -> observable classical validation -> separately frozen learner versus all classical and open-loop comparators -> Paper 2 -> Paper 3

implementation_gates_before_any_seed: generate and hash all 144 primary cell identities
prove risk-event CRN identity across policies
prove inactive risks consume no event or impact RNG
prove coupled event tapes implement the frozen offsets exactly
prove R3 is absent from the primary grid
prove seven 24-hour HOLD advances equal one 168-hour advance
prove HOLD creates no top-up and consumes no exogenous RNG
prove commitments cannot duplicate, cancel or overwrite
enumerate and hash every static, open-loop, weekly-clairvoyant and restricted timing template
commit source, contract, seed claim, command manifest, environment manifest and PGID/SID watcher

custody.watcher: session-wide PGID/SID or cgroup watcher started before the scientific process
